name: uart-node
description: ladis uart node (Bun runtime, PR #20 token auth)
author: wgcairui

scripts.build:docker: bun run build && docker build -t uartnode .
scripts.run:docker: docker stop uartnode 2>/dev/null; docker rm uartnode 2>/dev/null; docker run -itd --name uartnode --restart always --init -p 9000:9000 -e NODE_TOKEN=$NODE_TOKEN uartnode
